description:
Add a 'Letter' type reference to your library for Martin Luther King Jr.'s 'Letter from Birmingham Jail' with the following metadata:
- Item Type: Letter
- Title: Letter from Birmingham Jail
- Author: Martin Luther King Jr.
- Recipient: Eight Alabama Clergymen
- Date: April 16, 1963
- Type: Open Letter
- Abstract: An open letter written by Martin Luther King Jr. during the 1963 Birmingham campaign defending the strategy of nonviolent resistance.
